internal_issues.description: W019 (NMP poleward drift) verdict should be 'falsified' not 'standard_physics'. Dome author himself marked it REFINED (conceding failure). We are more charitable than the dome author.

W020 (Roaring 40s ≥3%) verdict should be 'falsified' not 'unfalsifiable'. Prediction had concrete ≥3% threshold; author conceded it was not met. Our own text says 'no clear test criterion' but ≥3% IS the criterion.
internal_issues.action: pending-human verdict change + text correction needed (our detail_reasoning is internally inconsistent)

internal_issues.description: PRED-NEW-002 (aetheric gravity wave 9.2 km/s) verdict should be 'standard_physics' not 'unfalsifiable'. 9.2 km/s falls within P-wave range (8-13 km/s). Calling it unfalsifiable gives dome unearned grievance.
SEC-2.4 typo: '7,400 k (the Tropic of Cancer...)m.' — km was split by a parenthetical insertion. Fixed to '7,400 km (...).'. Self-applied this run.
